Specific items are based on current availability. 322 Main Street Suite 200 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: -Low-income expectant mothers 32 weeks or further along with limited outside support -Age 0-3 months: Must meet all other program requirements Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Tuesday 12pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday 1pm-4pm Email (503) 623-4618 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF GREATER HILLSBORO GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides essential household items, including beds and bedding, linens, furniture, clothing, diapers, hygiene products, cleaning and laundry supplies, paper goods, and work boots. Donations are accepted of the items the agency distributes, with an ongoing need for couches, kitchen tables, and queen-size or smaller beds (including mattresses, box springs, and frames). Referrals to local food pantries are available. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday noon-2:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9:30am-noon Email (503) 917-0205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVEONE COMMUNITY OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY BRAX LAUNDRY ESTACADA LOVEONE LAUNDRY EVENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides laundry services including detergent and softeners, if needed. All services available on a first-come, first-serve basis. 24525 E Welches Road Welches, OR 97067 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st and 3rd Wednesday of the month 11am-5pm Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry with canned goods, dairy, grains, produce, and meat. Household items such as diapers and wipes, pet supplies, laundry detergent, cleaning supplies, and paper products may be available when supply allows. Availability of items rotate and are provided through donations. Food donations are accepted. 3223 SE 92nd Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Pantry: Tuesday 4pm-7pm, Thursday 10am-1pm except on federal holidays Email (503) 442-8228 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY HOME DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides delivery of food items, including canned goods, dairy, grains, produce, and meat. Household items such as diapers and wipes, pet supplies, laundry detergent, cleaning supplies, and paper products may be available when supply allows. Preordering is available online in multiple languages, and navigators can assist those who need help with the ordering process. 3223 SE 92nd Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Age 60 and older or age 18 and older with disabilities Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 427-8741 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVENTH DAY ADVENTIST KLAMATH FALLS COMMUNITY SERVICES OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community meal and distributes personal hygiene items and household cleaning products. Personal hygiene items include toothpaste, toothbrushes, shampoo, deodorant, razors, toilet paper, sanitary napkins, and baby wipes. Cleaning products include laundry soap, dish soap, and household cleaners.
